products.name: Burro da centrifuga
pros: Produced by centrifugation, resulting in a sweeter and higher quality butter
Generally considered superior to butter made from cream separation
Offers better taste and texture for cooking and spreading

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2026 guide recommends butter made by centrifugation as the best choice, citing its superior production method and quality. The evidence is fresh, published within the last 60 days.
videoSource: Burro: come sceglierlo, tipi, calorie e quanto consumarne
